data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding control implementation mapping with status lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Control implementation mapping with status lifecycle', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or records that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not contain concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to control implementation mapping, leading to an inconclusive result. Without this critical data, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is met or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence of control implementation mapping with status lifecycle being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and state of control implementation mapping.
